global.description: The ad features a bold red background with promotional text and buttons.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer with free delivery.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: A logo at the top left featuring the text 'PlateSprint' in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Text in the center that reads '2-for-1 tonight' in a large, bold font.

elements.label: Delivery text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main offer stating 'Free delivery over $15'.

elements.label: Decorative circles
elements.description: Three circular shapes arranged horizontally, possibly representing food items.

elements.description: A single circular shape positioned to the left of the main offer text.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button at the bottom center with the text 'Get offer' in a bold font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge at the top right corner with the text 'SALE' in a bright color.
